Explanation: I agree with the other agents. The evidence from [21822] shows that Orville Redenbacher began working with popcorn in 1940, developed a new hybrid popcorn by 1965, and made "Redenbacher" a brand name. The product was notably repackaged in 1982, the same year Michael Jackson's "Thriller" (the best-selling album as of 2022) was released. The founder also imported equipment and knowledge to ensure competitiveness, matching all clues in the question.
Exact Answer: Orville Redenbacher
